use_cases: Full-screen landing pages with animated section transitions using GSAP ScrollTrigger
Portfolio or storytelling sites with immersive scroll-driven navigation
Product showcases with parallax backgrounds and smooth transitions between content blocks
Creative agency sites requiring programmatic section navigation via next/prev/goTo API
ai_summary: FullScreenScrollFX is a GSAP-powered full-screen scrolling system that creates immersive page experiences with section-based navigation. Features include configurable background transitions (fade/wipe), parallax effects, smooth scroll support for Lenis, keyboard navigation with ARIA labels, and a complete imperative API for programmatic control. Designed for landing pages and storytelling experiences where content sections snap into view with orchestrated animations.
